channel.title: administrators on Dr. Soumyo Maity
channel.description: Recent content in administrators on Dr. Soumyo Maity

item.title: Application security for system administrators
item.description: As a system administrator, you play a critical role in the security of your organization’s applications. You are responsible for managing the systems that applications run on and for protecting those systems from attack. Here are some key things to keep in mind when it comes to application security: Applications are a target: Applications are a valuable target for attackers. They can be used to steal data, disrupt operations, or even launch attacks on other systems.
